highlights.label: Cloud Architecture
highlights.text: Led two full-stack enterprise cloud architecture rebuilds of acquired platforms ($24M in acquisitions), redesigning compute, messaging, security, IaC, and asset pipelines, achieving a 30% infrastructure cost reduction

highlights.label: Systems Design
highlights.text: Designed and built a distributed messaging system delivering learning content natively within Slack, enabling seamless platform integration for enterprise clients

highlights.label: DevOps
highlights.text: Created operational workflows and automated scaling policies enabling domain team ownership of the Content Authoring system, reducing operational overhead and improving deployment reliability

highlights.label: Feature Delivery
highlights.text: Delivered core product features with full-stack impact across Core, Search, and Content Authoring teams, including API development supporting key customer workflows

highlights.label: Leadership
highlights.text: Mentored and guided engineers across two globally distributed teams

highlights.label: Product Innovation
highlights.text: Drove Cornerstone for Salesforce from early-stage product to $6M ARR through multiple major releases and platform evolutions

highlights.label: API Development
highlights.text: Designed and built API services for Learning Management, Record System, and Reporting

highlights.label: Leadership
highlights.text: Joined as first internal developer, hired and built the engineering team, and established development processes and customer support workflows
